---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- Password for this course: grad566
     To change: update "grad566" below AND in students/index.qmd -->
<script>
const COURSE_PASSWORD = "grad566";
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  if (sessionStorage.getItem('econ566_auth') !== COURSE_PASSWORD) {
    window.location.href = 'index.html';
  }
});
</script>
```

::: {.content-section}

## Econ 566 — Environmental Economics {.section-heading}

**Instructor: Dana C. Andersen**

---

### Course Materials {.section-heading}

*Materials will be posted here.*

---

### Announcements {.section-heading}

*Check this page for updates.*

:::
